_note_template: Prompt 3 production template: new HONF core plus proven ChannelThermal physical local coupling. Existing src/ and Unified_Forward_Model_0 are not imported.

model._note_model: Sections are separated so the reusable HONF core stays distinct from ChannelThermal-specific local physics.

core_honf._note_core: Reusable HONF. Keep direct unrestricted module/env decoder disabled; the field path remains c_H + H-routed pairwise + global + near.
core_honf._note_use_hyper_value_context: Validated optional c_H value context remains enabled.
core_honf._note_pairwise: H-routed query-module pairwise kernel c_pair(q), not the old direct-memory attention.
core_honf._note_use_direct_module_env_decoder: Must remain false; Prompt 3 does not restore old direct-memory attention.

channelthermal._note_channelthermal: ChannelThermal physical input adapter, local surrogate attachment, and legacy output compatibility.
channelthermal._note_internal_prediction_mode: auto = local surrogate if attached, else global_head. Set global_head for fallback comparison; set local_surrogate for strict local-only debugging.

local_coupling._note_local_coupling: One-way local response coupling around the frozen Stage-A local surrogate. Teacher mode is for debugging, predicted mode is autonomous operation, mixed mode supports curriculum.

physical_correction._note_physical_correction: ChannelThermal-specific port/global and flux corrections. These are outside CORE HONF.
physical_correction._note_flux_modes: surrogate | physics_from_port | corrected_physics | blend. corrected_physics uses q_physics=h_effective*(T_surface-T_env)+delta_q.
physical_correction._note_interaction_refinement_steps: Only 0 or 1 is supported. One step refines T_env/h from decoded outside global temperature, then reruns the local surrogate.

dataset._note_dataset: Uses the existing packed global ChannelThermal HDF5 without preprocessing again.

loss._note_loss: Field, local internal/interface, supervised port, smoothness, port-global consistency, and predicted consistency losses. Task-specific old organizer losses are parsed but ignored unless mapped to generic weights.
loss._note_interface_target_weights: T_surface is intentionally stronger than q_normal.
loss._note_port_global_consistency_teacher_we: Usually 0 for teacher debugging because teacher ports already come from solved interface conditions.
loss._note_organizer: Only weak generic organizer regularization is allowed by default; legacy task-specific organizer losses are ignored with a warning if nonzero.

training._note_training: Use CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=2 externally for physical GPU 2. CPU works for smoke tests.

port_curriculum._note: Set schedule=none with mode=teacher for debugging, mode=predicted for autonomous operation, or teacher_to_predicted for curriculum.

checkpointing._note_checkpointing: Saves teacher/mixed validation bests plus autonomous predicted-port best.

paths._note_paths: All NewHONF runs are written outside old source trees.
